description: IC monthly meeting output generation contract — maps vault sources to docx + pptx + markdown placeholders. Used by ic-chair-agent to draft new meeting artifacts.
generation_pipeline: 3. Load all running ic/decisions/*.md and resolve current status per decision
4. Load all referenced ic/entities/*.md for portfolio composition
5. Render markdown meeting note → vault (so RAG indexes it)
6. Render docx via reference template → output/ic/
7. Render pptx via reference template → output/ic/
8. Surface to human approval queue (approval-ui port 4000)
9. Upon approval, sync to corporate share via sync-back service

docx_field_map.liquidity.current_stocks_mn: compute: sum of listed positions liquidatable < 1 quarter from dashboard
docx_field_map.liquidity.current_unlocked_funds_mn: compute: sum of open-end fund redemptions available < 1 quarter
docx_field_map.liquidity.risk_band: compute: (cash + stocks + unlocked) / fy_outflow → band per ic/concepts/liquidity-management-policy
docx_field_map.master_sheet.concentration_breaches: compute: any ic/entities/* where mtm > 0.25 * total_investments
docx_field_map.digital_assets_stub: Digital Assets and VC -Please refer to presentation. Please refer to appendix.

slides_2_to_11_macro.source: carry-forward from prior deck unless human chair flags refresh; agent surfaces 'macro refresh needed?' as pre-meeting decision

slide_12_okr_build.data: OKR-1 income table 8 line items totaling Bt 500mn

slide_16_round_1.data: Sell & Seed vs Sell only scenarios table

slide_19_blind_sell_problem.data: Current ratio + sell impact + smart-way overlay

slide_20_strike_leverage.data: Deribit, monthly yields, strike formula, gamma context, drawdown table

slide_23_sell_down_matrix.data: BTC/BNB units required at price levels × leverage

slide_24_board_summary.source: agent runtime output (this very SKILL produces it)

slide_26_dat_mtm.data: DAT MTM update + OKR-1b validator/staking run-rate

slide_28_new_loans.data: New structured loan plan + 40/60 strategic partner map
slide_28_new_loans.source: ic/entities/structured-loan-portfolio.md new loans plan + Strategic Partner Map

slide_32_blank_or_chart.note: Blank slide in reference deck; carry forward or remove

slide_33_prediction_market.data: 3-strategy table (Latency Arb, Delta-Neutral MM, Buy High & Settle) + blended row

slide_34_action_approval.data: Numbered list of every IC vote item this meeting
slide_34_action_approval.source: draft meeting note Action & Approval section + decisions_pending

approval_workflow.on_approval: sync-back service writes to corporate share + archives copy in /data/archive/ic/
approval_workflow.on_rejection: agent receives rejection reason via approval-ui callback; revises draft

hard_rules: NEVER write directly to corporate share — staging + approval only
NEVER invent figures — every number traces to vault file or timestamped external feed
NEVER auto-generate macro slides 2-11 — surface 'macro refresh needed?' as pre-meeting decision
ALWAYS produce the markdown twin alongside docx + pptx so RAG can index immediately
If a value is unknown, emit '[TBD — verify]' rather than guessing; surface in escalation_flags
The 9-item docx agenda is canonical for formal minutes; the 17-item deck agenda is for the deck only
